overall.description: Two characters sit on stone steps overlooking a snowy castle courtyard in a video game scene. The historic stone architecture and snow-covered grounds create a cold, atmospheric winter setting as distant figures walk through the plaza.

agents.ego_description: Two characters sitting stationary on stone steps, overlooking the snowy courtyard and castle grounds

distant figure walking across the snowy courtyard toward the castle

entered.detail: Large gothic stone castle with multiple towers and spires covered in snow
Open plaza with snow-dusted stone paving and pathways
Wide stone steps where the two characters are seated in the foreground
Large ornate stone urn or planter situated on the courtyard edge
Mountain range visible in the background behind the castle buildings

segments.scene_description: A static scene showing two characters seated on stone steps overlooking a vast snowy castle courtyard. The historic stone architecture of the castle dominates the background against snow-capped mountains, while sparse NPCs move through the plaza below. The atmosphere is cold and serene with diffused winter lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, wide-angle view of a cold and serene winter landscape centered on a historic castle courtyard. It begins with two characters seated on stone steps, overlooking a vast plaza where sparse figures move across the snow-covered ground. The camera captures the imposing stone architecture of the castle as it dominates the midground, framed against a backdrop of towering snow-capped mountains. The scene remains fixed, emphasizing the stillness of the environment under diffused winter lighting that blankets the entire courtyard in a soft, frozen glow.
